coreIssue: Usman is performing well but has not yet passed probation. This meeting focuses on understanding his growth path as a Lead Scrum Master, ensuring clarity on role expectations, and exploring feedback dynamics. Aligning his vision with your support will be key to his continued success.
openingQuestion: What does your ideal growth path look like as a Lead Scrum Master, and how can I support you in achieving that vision?
listenFor: whether Usman has a clear vision for his growth
if they feel confident about role expectations
avoid: do not assume Usman knows all role expectations
do not focus solely on current performance metrics
goodOutcome: You understand Usman's growth vision and have aligned on role expectations and feedback mechanisms.
suggestedAction: Schedule a follow-up in one month to review progress on role clarity and feedback implementation.
